title: Attribute Accessories
description: Datapack that adds Attribute-Modifying items. (for now, only Offhand Accessories.)
body:
# Attribute Accessories

A datapack that adds special items capable of modifying various player attributes in Minecraft.

Why do i make this? Because vanilla PVE is boring. So i installed a bunch of harder mobs mods, and i do my own way of balancing which turns into this. Have Fun!


## Features

This datapack introduces items that can modify the following attributes:
- **Health** - Increase or decrease max HP
- **Armor** - Boost protection
- **Armor Toughness** - Enhance damage resistance
- **Movement Speed** - Adjust walking / running speed
- **Gravity** - Modify how gravity affects you
- **Attack Speed** - Change how fast you can attack
- **Hitbox Size** - Alter the player / hitbox size
- **Attack Damage** - Increase melee damage
- **Interaction Range** - Extend block/entity reach
- And more! (See the [Attribute – Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Attribute) for full details, also we dont use a bunch of it because its bugged, or is not intended to be messed around with)

Oh yeah, we also created a Custom Attribute as of now:
  - **Strength 🟥**: Each Strength gives +0.25 Attack Damage and 1 Health Point.
  - **Agility 🟦**: Each Agility gives +3.5% Attack Speed and 0.4 Armor Toughness.
  - **Fortitude 🟪**: Each Fortitude gives +4% Knockback Resistance and 0.9 Armor.
  - Custom Attribute only applies in Weapon Attribute (and Armor in the future).

## Current Status

⚠️ **Work in Progress**

- ✅ **Offhand items** - Currently implemented
- ✅ **Weapons** - Currently implemented (stil not enough) and will add more soon
- ⏳ **Armor** - Coming soon
- ⏳ **Special items** - Coming soon
- ❌ **Resource pack** - Not available yet (im not good with drawing or doing resourcepack stuff lol so it prolly aint gonna come anytime soon)

## Installation & Usage

1. For those using modloader, use the mod version of your choice. For vanilla, install this datapack in your world's `datapacks` folder
2. Check the **CHANGELOG** for a complete list of items and their effects
3. Updates to the datapack does not change the stat of already crafted items, so only update when you truly want it already

---

Also, you can donate! I'm in the middle of making a short film as a hobby, i would really appreciate your donations. if not, try my datapack. give me your opinion about it in discord!

*For detailed information about Minecraft attributes and how they work, visit the official [Minecraft Wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Attribute).*

BTW, Some items are a references from Dota 2.
